title: Workshop: Embed a Constrained Public-Meeting Stream
summary: Workshop: Embed a Constrained Public-Meeting Stream uses an original public meeting stream build scenario to retrieve earlier HTML skills, add a bounded artifact layer, and verify transfer with source and browser evidence.
objectives: Retrieve html iframe, html links urls without step-by-step imitation.
Produce and verify a real public meeting stream build artifact or evidence report.
Preserve earlier valid requirements while diagnosing changed content and constraints.

starterFiles.html: <!-- Build the public information artifact here. -->

steps.title: Link a project-relative detail page · public meeting stream build checkpoint 1 · workshop
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 1: Link a project-relative detail page in the existing public meeting stream build artifact, then rerun every accumulated check. Work context: public meeting stream build.
steps.why: Workshop: Embed a Constrained Public-Meeting Stream keeps earlier work active while adding one testable HTML increment. This is checkpoint 1 in the public meeting stream build.

content.text: Edit the existing public meeting stream build artifact. Run the checks, inspect the preview, and preserve every earlier passing requirement.

options.text: Public meeting stream build case 3: the iframe title edits the heading shown inside the remote page, so it can be omitted when that page has an h1.
Public meeting stream build case 3: the parent document must name the iframe, constrain its permissions, and make its box responsive.
Public meeting stream build case 3: removing all constraints is safest because embedded content needs every browser capability.

content.text: Reconstruct the public meeting stream build sequence by dependency, not by how familiar each term looks.

options.text: public meeting stream build phase 8.1: identify the destination and user intent
public meeting stream build phase 8.2: choose absolute, relative, fragment, email, or telephone URL syntax
public meeting stream build phase 8.3: write link text that names the destination or action
public meeting stream build phase 8.4: activate the link and verify the resulting location
